SecurityHeaders.ContentSecurityPolicy: default-src 'self'; base-uri 'self'; object-src 'none'; frame-ancestors 'none'; form-action 'self'; img-src 'self' data:; script-src 'self'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline';
SecurityHeaders.PermissionsPolicy: camera=(), microphone=(), geolocation=(), payment=(), usb=(), fullscreen=(self)
